items.title: Flash floods submerge roads across Nabeul after record rainfall
items.description: Several main roads and the coastal highway are impassable after heavy overnight rain. Authorities report dozens of stranded vehicles and widespread water damage to parked cars.

items.title: Multi-vehicle collision closes the A1 motorway near Msaken
items.description: A pile-up involving several cars and a lorry has closed the northbound A1 near Msaken. Traffic is being diverted; recovery is under way.

items.title: Transport union announces one-day strike affecting Grand Tunis
items.description: Public transport across Grand Tunis will be disrupted on Thursday as the union stages a one-day stoppage over pay.

items.title: Ministry of Culture announces summer festival programme
items.description: The annual international festival returns with concerts and film screenings across several cities through August.
